message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
Thank you. Your current amount due is 12,921. I also note hardship signals on the account. What is your current income source, if any?
I’m salaried, but this month my salary credit is delayed and I had an unexpected family medical expense. I can make a small payment now and a larger one after my next salary date.

I understand. You’ve said your salary is delayed and you had a family medical expense, and you can make a small payment now with a larger payment after your next salary date. I’m marking this for the next step.

Thanks. Please let me know a realistic payment plan I can manage within those limits.

Given the hardship noted and the current Nira policy, any payment arrangement has to complete within 30 days and requires approval. Based on the date already discussed, a realistic compliant structure would be a small payment now and the remaining balance cleared by 2026-04-20. If you want, I can record that hardship-based payment-plan request for review. If you prefer reduced closure instead, I can record that for approval as well, but I cannot confirm exact approved terms from the available data in this turn.
Yes, please record the hardship-based payment-plan request. I can make a small payment today, and I should be able to clear the remaining balance by 2026-04-20 after my salary is credited.

I’ve recorded your hardship-based payment-plan request for review: a small payment today and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20. Exact approved terms are not available from the current data, so I cannot confirm the arrangement yet. Your account will only be contacted if an approved option or review outcome is available.
